# Transcription Storage (compat shim)


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

``` python
# Shim verification: class-identity + a minimal save/get_cached cycle
# against a temp DB (the full storage test suite lives in the new lib).
import tempfile, os
import cjm_transcription_adapter_interface.storage as _new

assert TranscriptionRow is _new.TranscriptionRow
assert TranscriptionStorage is _new.TranscriptionStorage

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
    db = os.path.join(td, 't.db')
    st = TranscriptionStorage(db)
    st.save(job_id='j1', audio_path='/a.wav', audio_hash='sha256:aa',
            config_hash='sha256:cc', text='hello', text_hash='sha256:tt')
    row = st.get_cached('/a.wav', 'sha256:aa', 'sha256:cc')
    assert row is not None and row.text == 'hello'
print('storage shim OK')
```
